form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] employeeId[员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>contract[合同信息]====== contractType[合同类型] signDate[签订日期] startDate[生效日期] endDate[到期日期] probationMonths[试用期月数] workingHoursPerWeek[每周工时] status[合同状态] =========>salary[薪资信息]====== annualSalary[年薪(税前)] monthlySalary[月薪(税前)] salaryCurrencyId[薪资币种] salaryPayMethod[发薪方式] socialInsuranceBase[社保基数] housingFundBase[公积金基数] =========>attachment[附件]====== attachmentFileId[合同文件] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] employeeId[员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>contract[合同信息]====== contractType[合同类型] signDate[签订日期] startDate[生效日期] endDate[到期日期] probationMonths[试用期月数] workingHoursPerWeek[每周工时] status[合同状态] =========>salary[薪资信息]====== annualSalary[年薪(税前)] monthlySalary[月薪(税前)] salaryCurrencyId[薪资币种] salaryPayMethod[发薪方式] socialInsuranceBase[社保基数] housingFundBase[公积金基数] =========>attachment[附件]====== attachmentFileId[合同文件] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[合同编号] employeeId[员工] contractType[合同类型] status[合同状态] businessDate[业务日期]
